ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Characters that mark the end of a sentence. Default: .!?
ast.target: 标记句子结束的字符。默认值：.!?

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Characters that may follow the end of a sentence, and should be included as part of it. Default: *“”‘’
ast.target: 可能跟随在句子结尾之后，并应作为句子一部分的字符。默认值：*“”‘’

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A list of titles ending in a period, e.g. "Mr.", "Ms.", "Mrs.", separated by new lines. Ensures that e.g. "Mr." is not mistakenly identified as the end of a sentence.
ast.target: 以句点结尾的称谓列表，例如 \"Mr.\", \"Ms.\", \"Mrs.\"，用换行符分隔。确保例如 \"Mr.\" 不会被错误地识别为句子的结尾。
